product_overview: Public-facing website for CAU Villa Lugano (Universidad Siglo 21) that showcases academic programs, provides institutional information and contact channels, and collects enrollment interest via a Supabase-backed form.
core_goals: Present programs (carreras) clearly with search/filter and detail modals to drive prospective student interest
Collect enrollment interest reliably via an enrollment form stored in Supabase (inscripciones table)
Provide clear contact, FAQ, and support-classes information for prospective and current students
Ensure responsive, SEO-friendly pages with hourly revalidation where required and analytics instrumentation

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Responsive top navigation with links to all sections, social media icons (WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram) and a mobile hamburger menu.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click navigation link to /faq -> See /faq page loaded
Navigate to / -> Click hamburger menu -> Click navigation link to /clases-apoyo -> See /clases-apoyo page loaded
Navigate to / -> Click social media icon 'WhatsApp' -> Observe external WhatsApp chat opens
Navigate to / -> Click hamburger menu -> Click a navigation link -> Observe mobile menu remains open (menu close failure)

features.name: Careers Catalog
features.description: Browse and filter academic programs by category and fuzzy text search; open career details in a modal with carousel navigation between careers.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click careers catalog category tab 'grado' -> Fill search input with 'Administración' -> See filtered career cards
Navigate to / -> Click a career card -> See career detail modal open
Navigate to / -> Click a career card -> See career detail modal open -> Click carousel next -> See next career in modal -> Click close modal -> See modal closed
Navigate to / -> Fill search input with 'asdlkfj' -> See 'No results' message
Navigate to / -> Click a career card -> Attempt to open detail modal -> See error message or modal fail-to-open

features.name: Enrollment Form
features.description: Form on the home page to submit enrollment interest; fields for nombre, apellido, email, telefono, localidad, career selection (searchable), career type filter, and equivalencias checkbox. Submissions are inserted into Supabase (inscripciones table).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to enrollment form on the page -> Fill nombre input
Fill apellido input -> Fill email input -> Fill telefono input -> Fill localidad input
Select career type 'grado' from dropdown -> Search and select career 'Administración' from dropdown -> Toggle equivalencias checkbox
Click submit button to send enrollment -> See success message confirming submission
Navigate to / -> Scroll to enrollment form -> Fill nombre input -> Leave email empty -> Click submit button to send enrollment -> See validation error for email

features.name: FAQ Page
features.description: Accordion-style FAQ list fetched from Supabase with a form to submit new questions.
user_flows: Navigate to /faq -> See list of questions
Navigate to /faq -> Click a question to expand -> See answer expand beneath the question -> Click the same question -> See answer collapse
Navigate to /faq -> Fill new-question form fields -> Click submit -> See success message confirming question submission
Navigate to /faq -> Fill new-question form with missing required field -> Click submit -> See validation error for missing field

features.name: Support Classes
features.description: List of available tutoring subjects with a weekly calendar view and individual subject detail pages at /clases-apoyo/[materia].
user_flows: Navigate to /clases-apoyo -> See list of available subjects
Navigate to /clases-apoyo -> Click next week control on weekly calendar -> See calendar update to next week
Navigate to /clases-apoyo -> Click a subject -> Navigate to /clases-apoyo/[materia] -> See subject detail page
Navigate to /clases-apoyo -> Click a subject that has no detail -> Navigate to /clases-apoyo/[materia] -> See 'Subject not found' or 404 message

features.name: Contact Page
features.description: Contact information page with address, WhatsApp link, social links and location details to facilitate direct contact.
user_flows: Navigate to /contacto -> View contact information and address
Navigate to /contacto -> Click WhatsApp link -> Observe external WhatsApp chat opens
Navigate to /contacto -> Click Facebook icon -> Observe external Facebook page opens
Navigate to /contacto -> Click WhatsApp link -> Observe link does not open or is broken -> See error/blocked behavior

features.name: About Us Page
features.description: Static informational page describing the CAU Villa Lugano center, mission and feature cards.
user_flows: Navigate to /sobre-nosotros -> See institutional content and headings
Navigate to /sobre-nosotros -> Scroll to feature cards -> View feature cards
Navigate to /sobre-nosotros -> Observe images fail to load -> See placeholders or broken layout

features.name: News Page (Novedades)
features.description: Paginated news listing at /novedades/[page]. Currently a stub pending Supabase migration; API routes are not implemented.
user_flows: Navigate to /novedades/1 -> See placeholder text indicating news content is pending
Navigate to /novedades/1 -> Attempt to load news items -> Observe no items returned due to API stub
Navigate to /novedades/2 -> See placeholder or empty page because news backend is not connected

features.name: Home Page (Hero & Footer)
features.description: Landing page with an animated hero and CTA, careers catalog, enrollment form and institutional footer. Footer contains institutional links and scroll-to-top behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero section with call-to-action button
Navigate to / -> Click hero CTA -> Scrolls or navigates to enrollment form
Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> Click a footer link to /sobre-nosotros -> See /sobre-nosotros page loaded
Navigate to / -> Click hero CTA -> Nothing happens (CTA broken)

routes.description: Home page with hero, careers catalog, enrollment form and footer
Frequently asked questions page fetched from Supabase
Support classes listing with weekly calendar
Contact information page with WhatsApp, social links, and address

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Responsive navbar with links to all sections and social media icons (WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram). Hamburger menu on mobile.
user_interactions: Click navigation links to go to different pages
Click social media icons (WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram)

features.name: Careers Catalog
features.description: Browse academic programs by category with fuzzy search, filter by type (grado, pregrado, diplomatura, certificado), and view career details in a modal
user_interactions: Search careers with text input (fuzzy match)
Click a career card to open detail modal

features.name: Enrollment Form
features.description: Form to submit enrollment interest. Fields for name, surname, email, phone, city, career selection with search dropdown, and career type filter
user_interactions: Search and select a career from dropdown
Click submit button to send enrollment

features.name: FAQ Page
features.description: Accordion-style frequently asked questions fetched from Supabase
user_interactions: Click a question to expand/collapse the answer
Submit a new question via form

features.name: Support Classes
features.description: Browse available tutoring subjects with a weekly calendar view
user_interactions: Click a subject to see detail page

features.name: Contact Page
features.description: Contact info with address, WhatsApp link, social media, and location details

features.name: About Us Page
features.description: Static page describing the CAU Villa Lugano educational center

known_limitations.issue: News page is a stub not connected to database
known_limitations.impact: Shows placeholder text, no real content
